summary: Tested extras quantity feature for POS system. All backend API tests passed (8/8). Frontend UI tests verified: extras modal shows product quantity badge, +/- buttons work for each extra, quantity persists after saving, price summary calculates correctly with quantity multiplier, cart displays extras with ×N format.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend create_order (line 4620) calculates extras_total with quantity: sum(price * quantity)
VERIFIED: Backend add-items (line 5003) calculates extras_total with quantity support
VERIFIED: Backend update-items (line 5075) calculates extras_total with quantity support
VERIFIED: Frontend extras modal (lines 4130-4250) has +/- buttons with data-testid for each extra
VERIFIED: Frontend cart display (lines 3169-3180) shows extras with ×N format when quantity > 1
VERIFIED: Frontend subtotal calculation (line 1283) includes ext.price * (ext.quantity || 1)
VERIFIED: Receipt bitmap (lines 319-338) shows base price only, extras listed separately with quantity
seed_data_creation: Added 3 extras to TEST_Product for testing: جبنة إضافية (1500 IQD), صوص حار (500 IQD), بصل مقلي (1000 IQD)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extras quantity feature fully implemented and tested. Product TEST_Product (id: 058301c2-9c08-4db0-ad7c-263335f03e32) now has 3 extras configured. Backend correctly calculates extras_total as sum(price*quantity). Frontend extras modal has +/- buttons with data-testid='extra-plus-{idx}' and 'extra-minus-{idx}'. Cart displays extras with ×N format. Receipt shows base price only with extras listed separately.

verified_features.feature: Backend: Create order with extras quantity
Backend: Multiple items with extras quantity
Backend: Update order items with extras quantity
verified_features.details: Updated extras quantity from 1 to 5, extras_total changed from 1000 to 5000

verified_features.feature: Backend: Add items with extras quantity
verified_features.details: Added item with extras quantity 3, extras_total=1500, subtotal recalculated

verified_features.feature: Backend: Default quantity (1) when not specified
verified_features.details: Extra without quantity field defaults to 1, extras_total=2000

verified_features.feature: Backend: Fetch order preserves extras quantity
verified_features.details: GET /api/orders/{id} returns extras with quantity field preserved
Extra with quantity=0 results in extras_total=0

verified_features.feature: Frontend: Product quantity badge in extras modal
verified_features.details: Badge shows '×2' when product quantity is 2, data-testid='extras-product-qty'
3 plus buttons, 3 minus buttons found with data-testid='extra-plus-{idx}'
Clicking + increases quantity, clicking - decreases, quantity displays correctly

verified_features.feature: Frontend: Price summary with quantity multiplier
verified_features.details: Shows '+ جبنة إضافية ×2: +IQD 3,000' format, total calculated correctly
After clicking حفظ, cart shows extras with ×N format and correct prices

verified_features.feature: Receipt: Base price only, extras listed separately
verified_features.details: receiptBitmap.js lines 274-275 show base price, lines 319-338 list extras with quantity

api_endpoints_tested.description: Update items with extras quantity recalculation
